title: 3D Rare Items
body:
# Gives many of the more "rare" Minecraft items 3D models to give them that special touch.

New models for:
- All Music Discs
- All Banner Patterns
- All Smithing Templates
- All Pottery Sherds
- Both Trial Keys
- Mace
- Trident
- Bows and Crossbows
- Totem of Undying
- Fishing Rod
- Shulker Shells
- Skulls, Heads, Compasses, and Clocks are rotated in hand to show their faces.


Possibly Planned:
- Goat Horns
- Sugarcane & Bamboo?
- Armor Stands?
- ?????

**Note:** Optifine or similar mod for emissive textures are not required, but recommended.
